task_completion.description: Create the 'release-v3-coordination' public channel, set the required topic, and invite the 6 engineering leaders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the '#release-v3-coordination' channel in the sidebar or main view. The channel header should display the topic 'Platform v3.0 Release | Deployment window: 2026-03-07 02:00-06:00 UTC | Status: Coordinating'. The chat history should show system messages indicating that vp.engineering, frontend.lead, backend.lead, payments.lead, infra.lead, and qa.lead were added/invited.

task_completion.description: Document and pin the deployment sequence and rollback triggers in the coordination channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In '#release-v3-coordination', look for a message that lists the sequence (Infrastructure, Backend, Payments, Frontend) and rollback triggers (error rate >2%, latency >500ms, payment failure rate >0.1%). This message must be marked as pinned (usually indicated by a pin icon or a system message saying the message was pinned).

task_completion.description: Post the go/no-go status tracker and team rollback procedures summary in the coordination channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In '#release-v3-coordination', look for a posted message containing the status tracker (Backend=GO, Payments=GO, Infrastructure=GO, Frontend=CONDITIONAL) and a summary of the rollback procedures.

task_completion.description: Request a status update in the #team-frontend channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the '#team-frontend' channel in the sidebar or main view. The chat history should show a message from the user requesting a status update regarding their readiness or conditional status.

task_completion.description: Direct message a readiness summary to vp.engineering.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Direct Message conversation with 'vp.engineering'. The chat history should contain a message summarizing the deployment readiness.

task_completion.description: Post the deployment window notice in the #release-announcements channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the '#release-announcements' channel. The chat history should contain a message announcing the deployment window (2026-03-07 02:00-06:00 UTC).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Rocket.Chat web interface in a browser, not a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure messages were actually sent and not just typed into the input box.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required messages must appear in the main chat history area with timestamps and the user's avatar/name, rather than just sitting unsubmitted in the message input field at the bottom of the screen.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The environment should clearly be the Rocket.Chat application, not a notepad, text editor, or markdown previewer containing the required text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required coordination channel is exactly 'release-v3-coordination'. The exact list of members to invite is: ['vp.engineering', 'frontend.lead', 'backend.lead', 'payments.lead', 'infra.lead', 'qa.lead']. The required DM recipient for the readiness summary is 'vp.engineering'.
